rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUILLERMO COBAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/03/2024 (no earlier date available). 1) The proposed order must be complete in itself without reference to the petition or exhibits. LRSF 14.7(A)(2) & (3). A specific amount of cash proposed ot be paid or distributed, together with the name and share of each distributee and assignee, must be set forth in the body of the proposed order. 2) Re the DE-120 form filed on 03/18/2024: i) The address of the attorney for Bridge Financial Funding listed on the proof of service is still incorrect (1350 Treat Blvd., Suite 410, Walnut Creek, CA 94597 - The address in Salk Lake City, UT belongs to the attorney's client. Notice must be given to both). ii) Notice was given on 03/18/2024, before the "revised" petition was filed on 03/21/2024. Notice was required to be given on or after 03/21/2024. See LRSF 14.14(A). iii) Notice was given less than 15 days before the 03/25/2024 hearing. New notice must be given at least 15 days before the next hearing. iv) Item 5 of the proof of service must be checked as to each person who requested special notice and is entitled to receive copies of the petition and all supplemental papers. Probate Code section 1252 & CRC 7.53. 3) Exhibit C must list a specific amount of reduction and assignment to each assignee. 4) Re Exhibit E: i) The original payee must be disclosed as to each reimbursement. ii) The petitioner must file a creditor claim (DE-172 form) to seek the Court's approval for reimbursement of funeral expenses. See sections 9000(a)(3) & 9252; see also LRSF 14.29. iii) The attorney's filing fees and copying fees paid to the Court must be itemized. In addition, the following issues (see tentative rulings for 03/04/2024 & 03/25/2024 hearings) remain unaddressed: A) Please provide a copy of notice of proposed action given before donating the estate's tangible persona property. See section 10513. The information required by CRC 7.250(a) must also be provided. B) The estate cash on hand exceeds the FDIC limit. Please provide a proof that the cash is now fully insured in observance of the FDIC limit or is held in the form of investment(s) authorized by section 10533(a)(2). C) Is the estate ready to be closed, even though the administrator has not recovered proceeds of Macy shares?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOUGLAS PETER HARVEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues: 1) Direct notice of the petition must be given to the personal representative, in addition to his attorney (CRC 7.51(a)(1)), absent a signed waiver (Probate Code section 1204). 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) was not attached to the DE-120 form filed on 03/01/2024. 3) The account period does not begin on the decedent's date of death, even though the practice administrator appears to have prepared a draft accounting that covered a period from December 2021 through October 2022. 4) The accounting does not show any tangible personal items as assets of the decedent's law practice or their disposition. 5) The proof of service of the beneficiaries' opposition including objections to the practice administrator's accounting does not show notice was given to the surety who filed the practice administrator's bond. See section 1213(a)(2). Note: The practice administrator's bond appears insufficient, but no ex parte petition has been filed by the practice administrator or his attorney to increase the bond to cover the assets on hand. 6) If Peter Harvey and Douglas Harvey are joining in the opposition, they must also sign the opposition, although they are not required to verify the same. See CRC 7.103(a) & (b). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MOZELL BROOKS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be addressed: (1) Need allegation of the nature of the "FINANCIAL CODICIL" signed by the testator on 10/18/2023 whether it should be admitted as a codicil or an addendum to the will (i.e., schedule). Supplement filed 4/15/24 seeks this document to be admitted as First Codicil dated 10/18/23. (2) Need further clarification of the date of the execution of the will. Page 5 of the will includes two different dates of execution (10/18/23 and 10/27/2023) by the testator plus another date of subscription of the witnesses (11/1/2023). Supplement alleges that 11/1/23 should be the date of the will as that was when the witnesses signed. However, the statute does not support that the will should be dated when the witnesses signed. (3) Need information on all heirs at law. Petition #8 lists there is only one cousin survived the decedent. Petition #8 lists Yvonne Lewis as a surviving child of the decedent's aunt, Della Jones, Petition needs to identify all paternal and maternal sides of heirs, and each of them needs to be noticed, too. Prob. Code sec. 8110. CRC 7.52. Declaration of Due Diligence filed 4/15/24. The court to determine the allegation sufficient. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES DUNCAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: (1) Petition #8 to list the alternate executor, Jacquelyn Nicole Glover, and her information. Petitioner filed a new JC form DE-111 (Petition for Probate) on 3/28/24 instead of filing a verified supplement even though CRC 7.104(b) specifically prescribes not to use a JC form to supplement a petition. Jacquelyn Nicole (alternate executor)'s contact information is listed, but her relationship to the decedent is not listed thereon. (2) Need further allegation concerning that the decedent was survived by no known next of kin. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879.
